kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: And Enter Valid Credentials
Enter Username
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Type the given username into the username field

kw.name: Enter Password
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Type the given password into the password field
Enter the valid username and password

kw.name: When Submit Login Form
Click Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Click the login submit button
Click the login button to submit the form

kw.name: Then User Is Redirected To Secure Page
User Should Be On Secure Page
Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.
Assert the browser is redirected to the secure area URL

kw.name: Flash Message Should Contain
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'id=flash' contains text 'You logged into a secure area!'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.
Assert that the flash message contains the expected text
Verify the user lands on the secure area page

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Verify that a user can log in with valid credentials and sees the welcome message

test.name: TC_002 — Login With Wrong Password

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: And Enter Credentials With Wrong Password
Enter Username
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Type the given username into the username field

kw.name: Enter Password
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Type the given password into the password field
Enter a valid username but an incorrect password

kw.name: When Submit Login Form
Click Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Click the login submit button
Click the login button to submit the form

kw.name: Then User Remains On Login Page With Password Error
User Should Stay On Login Page
Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.
Assert the browser remains on the login page URL

kw.name: Flash Message Should Contain
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.
Assert that the flash message contains the expected text
Verify the user stays on login page with invalid password message

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Verify that login fails with a wrong password and an error message is displayed

test.name: TC_003 — Login With Wrong Username

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: And Enter Credentials With Wrong Username
Enter Username
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Type the given username into the username field

kw.name: Enter Password
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Type the given password into the password field
Enter an invalid username but the correct password

kw.name: When Submit Login Form
Click Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Click the login submit button
Click the login button to submit the form

kw.name: Then User Remains On Login Page With Username Error
User Should Stay On Login Page
Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.
Assert the browser remains on the login page URL

kw.name: Flash Message Should Contain
kw.doc: Assert that the flash message contains the expected text
Verify the user stays on login page with invalid username message

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Verify that login fails with an invalid username and an error message is displayed

test.name: TC_004 — Logout After Successful Login

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: And Enter Valid Credentials
Enter Username
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Type the given username into the username field

kw.name: Enter Password
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Type the given password into the password field
Enter the valid username and password

kw.name: And Submit Login Form
Click Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Click the login submit button
Click the login button to submit the form

kw.name: And User Is Redirected To Secure Page
User Should Be On Secure Page
Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.
Assert the browser is redirected to the secure area URL

kw.name: Flash Message Should Contain
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'id=flash' contains text 'You logged into a secure area!'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.
Assert that the flash message contains the expected text
Verify the user lands on the secure area page

kw.name: When User Logs Out
Click Logout Button
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.
Click the logout button on the secure page
Click the logout button on the secure page

kw.name: Then User Is Redirected To Login Page After Logout
User Should Stay On Login Page
Location Should Be
kw.msg: Location should have been 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login' but was 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.
kw.status: Location should have been 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login' but was 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure'.

kw.doc: Assert the browser remains on the login page URL
kw.status: Location should have been 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login' but was 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure'.

kw.name: Flash Message Should Contain
kw.doc: Assert that the flash message contains the expected text
Verify the user is back on login page with logout confirmation
kw.status: Location should have been 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login' but was 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure'.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Verify that a logged-in user can log out and is redirected to the login page
test.status: Location should have been 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login' but was 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure'.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
